prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A single candle at lower-left throws warm amber light across an aged man's white robe and folded hands, while the upper background falls away into deep blue-black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An aged man with a long grey beard, in a loose white robe, lies at rest on a draped couch, his eyes closed and both hands folded together upon his chest in peaceful stillness. A lit candle and a feather pen at rest sit on a cloth-draped table at the lower-left. The upper background is dim and shadowed, its painted detail receding into darkness. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the aged man at rest on the draped couch, candle glowing at left, deep shadow above.

Cut to mid framing — the man's upper body and the folded hands at rest on his chest.

Cut to close-up — the peaceful face, closed eyes, grey beard warm in the candlelight.

Cut to insert — the folded hands at rest upon the chest, fingers still.

Cut to insert — the candle flame on the cloth-draped table at left.

Cut to insert — the feather pen at rest beside the candle.

Cut to lower framing — the draped white robe and the bare foot at the couch's end.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the man's peaceful face.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- candle flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
A quiet, peaceful death held in candlelight.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
